caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Bimini Waters Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds of 31 knots with wave heights reaching 5.4 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 8 seconds. Rain chances are elevated to 66 percent, creating locally rough marine conditions near the port while San Juan remains relatively calm with winds near 13 knots.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing steady winds up to 19 knots with wave heights reaching 5.9 feet under a dominant west swell direction and a 9-second swell period. Rain probability is at 100 percent, indicating persistent rainfall that will affect marine and port operations throughout the day.
